underlying_goal: User wanted to continue work from previous session - initially fixing syntax errors in load tests, running them, then creating a voice bridge microservice with WebSocket support, setting up subdomain, and configuring Nginx
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly tried trial-and-error Nginx configurations after being explicitly told to stop and read/learn first
brief_summary: User successfully fixed load test syntax errors and ran tests, created voice bridge microservice infrastructure and subdomain, but became frustrated when Claude continued trial-and-error Nginx configuration instead of researching the proper approach first.
